publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-07-20 18:28:13 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Letters to and from Robert Pannett when he was at Cornell, 1948-1954, other correspondence, miscellaneous pictures and other items relating to Cornell.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524rareref@cornell.eduhttp://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
bioghist.p: Robert F. Pannett graduated from Cornell with a B.A. in Applied Physics in 1952 and an M.S. in Applied and Engineering Physics in 1954. After graduating, he worked for McDonnell Aircraft as project manager for the Gemini IV capsule. Papers relating to his career are held by the University of Houston.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Letters to and from Robert Pannett when he was at Cornell, 1948-1954, other correspondence, miscellaneous pictures and other items relating to Cornell.

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Robert F. Pannett Papers, #37-5-4087. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
